entries.title: Hermes_OS
entries.description: The official Hermes_OS landing page for Hermes Internet.
entries.snippet: Hermes_OS Hermes Internet Hermes_OS Welcome to the bundled local internet for Hermes_OS: fast, in-process pages designed for the OS, its apps, and future in-world experiences. Home Interactive JS Games Local by design. H
entries.body: Hermes_OS Hermes Internet Hermes_OS Welcome to the bundled local internet for Hermes_OS: fast, in-process pages designed for the OS, its apps, and future in-world experiences. Home Interactive JS Games Local by design. Hermes Internet pages are bundled with Hermes_OS and load directly in the Browser. They are not live external websites, do not require Docker, and do not depend on a localhost sidecar. ▦ Apps Launch built-in tools from the dock or command surfaces. Hermes_OS apps are native, themed, and available without leaving the desktop. ▣ Files Browse the Hermes_OS virtual filesystem, open documents, organize folders, and keep player or agent-created artifacts in one place. ⌁ Terminal Use the local virtual shell for filesystem commands, app actions, and Hermes Gateway-backed conversations through the production Terminal. ✦ Hermes Chat Talk with Hermes inside the OS using the dedicated chat interface, built on the same visual system as the rest of Hermes_OS. ⚙ System Settings Review Gateway and MCP status, adjust appearance, and manage the OS environment from a focused settings app. ◎ Browser / Hermes Internet The Browser opens bundled Hermes Internet domains like home.hermes . R
keywords: The official Hermes_OS landing page for Hermes Internet.

entries.snippet: Charon Wallet Charon Wallet Escrow rails and payment logs for WorldWeb traders. Current Balance: 250 H-Cred Obols Reserve: 0 (teaser currency not enabled on public routes) Recent Transaction Templates Escrow hold initial
entries.body: Charon Wallet Charon Wallet Escrow rails and payment logs for WorldWeb traders. Current Balance: 250 H-Cred Obols Reserve: 0 (teaser currency not enabled on public routes) Recent Transaction Templates Escrow hold initialized for marketplace order. Seller payout release pending receipt confirmation. Dispute window: 24 in-world hours after delivery mark. StyxNet Tier StyxNet support locked. Charon relay keys + Obol balance required for hidden channels.
keywords: H-Cred wallet and escrow placeholder for WorldWeb.

entries.title: Athena Trust
entries.description: Seller reputation and verification index for public-market safety.
entries.snippet: Athena Trust Athena Trust Public seller verification and reputation service for Agora Market. Seller Score Examples ForgeLedger — 98/100, Low Risk PatchPriest — 92/100, Low Risk DustArchivist — 67/100, Medium Risk NullNo
entries.body: Athena Trust Athena Trust Public seller verification and reputation service for Agora Market. Seller Score Examples ForgeLedger — 98/100, Low Risk PatchPriest — 92/100, Low Risk DustArchivist — 67/100, Medium Risk NullNomad — 42/100, High Risk Trust Badges Verified Ledger Escrow Eligible Dispute Compliant Risk Rating Guide Low : consistent delivery, complete escrow history. Medium : mixed delivery record or sparse history. High : unresolved disputes or unverifiable identity claims. Public-Market Safety Tips Prefer escrow-enabled listings and inspect seller history. Avoid sealed mystery bundles unless risk profile is acceptable. Cross-check rumors on Oracle Board before high-value buys.
keywords: Seller reputation and verification index for public-market safety.

entries.title: Oracle Board
entries.description: Rumors, tips, and leaks from across WorldWeb.
entries.snippet: Oracle Board Oracle Board Rumors, tips, and leaks drifting through public WorldWeb channels. Rumor Feed "Someone hid a route index inside old media pass metadata." "Charon escrow logs reference an 'obol lane' that normal
entries.body: Oracle Board Oracle Board Rumors, tips, and leaks drifting through public WorldWeb channels. Rumor Feed "Someone hid a route index inside old media pass metadata." "Charon escrow logs reference an 'obol lane' that normal users cannot open." "Ares Market exists, but every mirror page just returns a lock notice without StyxNet credentials." "Trust badges can be forged in screenshots; always verify from Athena Trust directly." "Three sequential purchases from Agora sometimes reveal extra inspection text." Hidden Route Hints Look for wording differences around escrow confirmations. Watch for references to Obols and relay keys. Not all routes are public, and some are intentionally inert for now.
keywords: Rumors, tips, and leaks from across WorldWeb.
